response.justification: While Szabo demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and language versatility, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's requirements. His C++ experience ended over a decade ago (National Instruments, 2014–2015); his recent decade has been TypeScript/JavaScript in consumer tech (Stripe, Shopify). He has zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure—a mandatory requirement. His SQL knowledge is generic and MongoDB-centric, with no SQL Server or Oracle background. This role requires immediate mid-senior productivity in a specialized domain; he would face substantial ramp-up time on both the C++ platform and financial systems.
strengths: Proven ability to master multiple languages and architectural domains across web, embedded, and systems work
Strong infrastructure and CI/CD expertise, including microservices, high-performance systems, and deployment pipelines
Excellent communication demonstrated through workshops, public talks, and technical training course design
concerns: Last hands-on C++ work was 10+ years ago; current expertise is TypeScript/JavaScript and modern web stacks
No experience in capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking—a mandatory domain requirement
Primary database experience is MongoDB; no demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise required for the role
